Cost of that debt is still part of the WACC for the JV tho? Why should Apollo’s debt cost on this JV be lower than INTC debt costs? I get that they’re keeping the debt off balance sheet but that doesn’t mean it should be lower cost debt?

Why not? Whatever debt the Apollo vehicle takes on to finance their side of the JV is off BS for INTC. So effectively INTC are lowering their CoC by introducing debt financing that doesn't clutter up their BS
why can they do higher leverage than INTC tho?

Pokud neradi čtete v metaforách, tak ano, dal jsem výpověď.

Mně přijde trochu porouchaná. 🤷
